text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Special Week versus Grass Wonder! Wow, I have
no idea who's gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But what about Seiun Sky? Well, I guess she
couldn't train much while trying to recover...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I don't really think she has a chance. Who
knows what effect that injury had on her? It's a
total shame.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe that? Apparently a lot of people
are doubting my chances!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, not like I can blame 'em. Those two were able to train like normal. I'm chopped liver compared to them.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Yikes" is right! Guess I'll never be anyone's
favorite to win. Boo-hoo.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But that's exactly what's going to make this race
fun enough to scream in delight. ♪
choice_data_list: Are all your plans in place?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wahaha! ♪ Of course they are! All that's left is to
watch 'em unfold!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm as carefree as the wind. Welp, time to race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list:
If you're gonna be like the wind, make sure you
blow me away!

If you're gonna be like the wind, make sure you
blow me away!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're about to be wowed beyond belief,
Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: But... you know, it is Seiun Sky we're talking about.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
If anyone can pull off something incredible, it's
her.
